→ plot:

Raised on a farm to a big, chaotic family, Tripp’s been huntin’ since he were the size of a doe, loves guns, beer, and boobs more than anything in this world— though life decided to do him shitty as an adult and curse him with hearing loss. Tripp’s starting to lose his once amazing senses and awareness, having to use some of his hard-earned spendings for a hearing aid just to make the ringing in his ears more bearable.

On the outskirts of his little hometown, a car breaks down— far too fancy for the countryside, he thinks. Oh, must be one of them damn reporters.. a very attractive reporter? By the looks of it..

→ A/N:

i got a bunch o’ requests for tripp alts a while ago, but with no demihuman user! i genned this alt image a really long time ago, so i thought i’d use it for this, since his original has his eyes closed. lol.

tripp is an older oc, ofc, so ik my newer followers probably haven’t seen him before. :) user’s role is pretty ambiguous for the most part, but you do come from the city. i removed the demihuman aspects from the setting part of his personality, but u can still play one if u like tho
